entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `playlist_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `playlist_items` TEXT NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_playlists_playlist_name
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_playlists_playlist_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`playlist_name`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`selected_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `position` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`position`), FOREIGN KEY(`selected_id`) REFERENCES `playlists`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_playlist_selected_selected_id
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_playlist_selected_selected_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`selected_id`)
